meta.poznamky: sketch_code používá PenDown/PenUp protože mezera je součástí referenčního obrázku

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]přerušovanou čáru[/hlp] — čára 40px, mezera 15px, čára 40px.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="20" y="40"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="2" x="200" y="200"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3" x="280" y="80"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="4" x="60" y="260"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="5" x="140" y="120"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="6" x="240" y="300"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="6"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
